canonical_definition: A data contamination procedure where words are randomly swapped with a generic token to test robustness.
papers: Transformer Meets Twicing: Harnessing Unattended Residual Information

definitions.text: A data contamination procedure where words are randomly swapped with a generic token to test robustness.
A data contamination procedure used for evaluation where words in a text sequence are randomly swapped with a generic token to test model robustness.
definitions.paper: Transformer Meets Twicing: Harnessing Unattended Residual Information

characterization: A data contamination procedure where words are randomly swapped with a generic token to test robustness.
